default_text: Are you sure you want to remove this cleaner from your property?

default_text: How do I create a cleaning schedule?

translations.en: How do I create a cleaning schedule?

default_text: Navigate to your Dashboard → Properties → Select a property → 'Create Schedule'. Set date, time, frequency, and special instructions. Review and confirm to publish.

translations.en: Navigate to your Dashboard → Properties → Select a property → 'Create Schedule'. Set date, time, frequency, and special instructions. Review and confirm to publish.

default_text: Can I select a specific cleaner?

translations.en: Can I select a specific cleaner?

default_text: Yes! After creating a schedule, you'll see 'Choose Cleaner' option. Browse profiles, ratings, and reviews to select your preferred professional.

translations.en: Yes! After creating a schedule, you'll see 'Choose Cleaner' option. Browse profiles, ratings, and reviews to select your preferred professional.

default_text: Payments are processed securely via Stripe. You'll be charged after cleaning completion. View receipts in Payment History. Cancelations within 24hrs are fully refunded.

translations.en: Payments are processed securely via Stripe. You'll be charged after cleaning completion. View receipts in Payment History. Cancelations within 24hrs are fully refunded.

default_text: What if my cleaner cancels last minute?

translations.en: What if my cleaner cancels last minute?

default_text: We automatically notify backup cleaners. If no replacement found, you get 100% refund plus 20% off next booking. Contact support for immediate assistance.

translations.en: We automatically notify backup cleaners. If no replacement found, you get 100% refund plus 20% off next booking. Contact support for immediate assistance.

default_text: How do I modify or cancel a booking?

translations.en: How do I modify or cancel a booking?

default_text: Go to Upcoming Schedules → Select booking → 'Modify' or 'Cancel'. Changes within 24hrs may incur fees. View cancellation policy in Terms.

translations.en: Go to Upcoming Schedules → Select booking → 'Modify' or 'Cancel'. Changes within 24hrs may incur fees. View cancellation policy in Terms.

default_text: Can I add special instructions for cleaners?

translations.en: Can I add special instructions for cleaners?

default_text: How do I review my cleaner?

translations.en: How do I review my cleaner?

default_text: After cleaning completion, you'll receive a review prompt. Rate 1-5 stars and add comments. Reviews are anonymous to cleaners.

translations.en: After cleaning completion, you'll receive a review prompt. Rate 1-5 stars and add comments. Reviews are anonymous to cleaners.

default_text: Dusting, vacuuming, mopping, bathroom sanitization, kitchen cleaning, trash removal. See Services menu for detailed checklist.

translations.en: Dusting, vacuuming, mopping, bathroom sanitization, kitchen cleaning, trash removal. See Services menu for detailed checklist.

default_text: How do I report damage or issues?

translations.en: How do I report damage or issues?

default_text: Yes! Choose 'Recurring' when creating schedule. Set frequency (weekly, bi-weekly, monthly). Easily manage in Recurring Schedules tab.

translations.en: Yes! Choose 'Recurring' when creating schedule. Set frequency (weekly, bi-weekly, monthly). Easily manage in Recurring Schedules tab.

translations.en: How do I update my property details?

translations.en: Note: You’ll only be paid if selected and you participate in the task.

default_text: Go to your dashboard, select a property, and tap 'Create Schedule'. Fill out the necessary details like date, time, and cleaning requirements, then submit to publish your schedule.

translations.en: Go to your dashboard, select a property, and tap 'Create Schedule'. Fill out the necessary details like date, time, and cleaning requirements, then submit to publish your schedule.

default_text: Can I select a preferred cleaner?

translations.en: Can I select a preferred cleaner?

default_text: Absolutely! After setting up a schedule, browse through nearby available cleaners, view their ratings and reviews, then send a personalized request to your preferred choice.

translations.en: Absolutely! After setting up a schedule, browse through nearby available cleaners, view their ratings and reviews, then send a personalized request to your preferred choice.

default_text: How do cleaners accept or decline tasks?

translations.en: How do cleaners accept or decline tasks?

default_text: Cleaners receive instant notifications for new requests. They can view complete task details including location, time, and payment before accepting or declining within the app.

translations.en: Cleaners receive instant notifications for new requests. They can view complete task details including location, time, and payment before accepting or declining within the app.

default_text: How can I reset my password?

translations.en: How can I reset my password?

default_text: Navigate to Profile → Security Settings → Change Password. Follow the verification steps to securely reset your credentials.

translations.en: Navigate to Profile → Security Settings → Change Password. Follow the verification steps to securely reset your credentials.

default_text: Visit the 'Properties' section, select the property, tap 'Edit' to update room details, address, special instructions, or upload new photos.

translations.en: Visit the 'Properties' section, select the property, tap 'Edit' to update room details, address, special instructions, or upload new photos.

default_text: What if a cleaner doesn't show up?

translations.en: What if a cleaner doesn't show up?

default_text: Immediately report through the schedule details. We'll initiate our backup protocol to find a replacement or process a full refund.

translations.en: Immediately report through the schedule details. We'll initiate our backup protocol to find a replacement or process a full refund.

default_text: After completion, go to Schedule History, select the task, and navigate to the 'Gallery' tab to view all uploaded photos.

translations.en: After completion, go to Schedule History, select the task, and navigate to the 'Gallery' tab to view all uploaded photos.

default_text: How do I get paid as a cleaner?

translations.en: How do I get paid as a cleaner?

default_text: Earnings are automatically processed every Monday to your linked payment method. View your payment history in the Earnings section.

translations.en: Earnings are automatically processed every Monday to your linked payment method. View your payment history in the Earnings section.

default_text: How do I report an issue?

translations.en: How do I report an issue?

default_text: Open the completed task, scroll to 'Report Issue', provide details with photos if needed. Our team will respond within 24 hours.

translations.en: Open the completed task, scroll to 'Report Issue', provide details with photos if needed. Our team will respond within 24 hours.

default_text: Use any contact method below. For urgent matters, call our hotline. Email responses typically within 2-4 business hours.

translations.en: Use any contact method below. For urgent matters, call our hotline. Email responses typically within 2-4 business hours.

default_text: How can we help you today?

translations.en: How can we help you today?

default_text: Try different keywords or browse our FAQ categories

translations.en: Try different keywords or browse our FAQ categories

default_text: Our support team is available 7 days a week to assist you with any questions or concerns.
